title: struthiopteris australis
intro: Struthiopteris australis, also known as Black Oar Weed, is a type of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Struthiopteris australis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Struthiopteris australis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
